20.reason: [When the stack is full (len == 100), the program should output "error " for a push operation, but instead it silently skips the operation.]

28.reason: [After processing all operations, the program incorrectly prints the remaining elements in the stack. The problem only requires outputting popped elements (or "error") during pop operations, not the final stack contents.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [After processing all operations, the program incorrectly prints the remaining elements in the stack. The problem only requires outputting popped elements (or "error") during pop operations, not the final stack contents.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [After processing all operations, the program incorrectly prints the remaining elements in the stack. The problem only requires outputting popped elements (or "error") during pop operations, not the final stack contents.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The problem requires only the popped elements to be printed during pop operations. This extra loop prints remaining stack elements at the end, which is not part of the expected output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The problem requires only the popped elements to be printed during pop operations. This extra loop prints remaining stack elements at the end, which is not part of the expected output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The problem requires only the popped elements (or "error") to be printed during operations. This extra loop prints remaining stack elements after processing all operations, which violates the output specification.]
